method: Aggregate Yield and Production grouped by District and Season, then use a bar chart (V1) to visualize the comparison. Each bar represents aggregated metrics for a district-season pair.
objective: Understand overall productivity trends across districts and seasons.

method: Normalize Yield and Production by dividing them by Area to derive per-hectare metrics. Use a box plot (V2) to display the distribution of normalized per-hectare yields across districts and seasons.
objective: Allow fair comparison of productivity across districts with varying cultivation areas.

method: Use a heat map (V4) to analyze correlations between per-hectare Area, Yield, and Production by Crop and District. Each heat map cell will represent the strength of correlation for a given district and crop.
objective: Reveal relationships between area and productivity metrics to help identify factors affecting crop yields.

method: Aggregate year-over-year yield data for each crop and district. Use a line chart (V3) to display yield changes over time. Enhance interactivity with trend line generation (I4) for forecasting future yields.
objective: Identify district-crop combinations with significant yield variations over the years and predict future trends.

method: Detect districts with unusually high or low Yield or Production relative to their cultivation Area. Highlight anomalies using scatter plots (V5), where axis encodings represent Area and Yield values for specific districts and crops.
objective: Identify and investigate districts with potential issues or atypical successes in crop productivity.

method: Enable filtering of data by Crop, District, and Season (I1) to isolate specific subsets of interest. Brushing and linking across visualizations (I2) will allow connected exploration of district-level productivity data.
objective: Facilitate focused analysis of crop productivity metrics based on user-defined dimensions.

method: Allow dynamic sorting of categorical axes, such as districts, based on average Yield or total Production (I5), to emphasize high-performing entities. Integrate this interaction with visualizations like bar charts (V1).
objective: Focus on districts with significant metrics to understand regions of high crop productivity.

method: Enable drill-down interaction (I3) to explore productivity details at a micro-level. Users can start with aggregated district-season metrics and navigate to specific crop-level metrics and normalized yield values.
objective: Provide a comprehensive analysis pipeline from high-level overviews to granular insights for better decision-making.

method: Combine bar charts for seasonal crop yield comparison with line chart projections for future trends (V6). Allow users to interactively adjust forecast parameters (I4) to visualize scenario-based predictions.
objective: Clearly articulate seasonal yield patterns and project future yield scenarios for effective planning.

method: Support hover interactions on scatter plots (V5) and bar charts (V1) to display precise values and metadata, such as crop type, district details, and derived metrics.
objective: Enable quick exploration of details without overwhelming visualizations, improving usability.
